description: Cross-platform envelope scan allowlist. Every exception must carry a reason. Path patterns support a single trailing /** for directory match; otherwise exact match. F10.2.2 (a3fb7ac+).

exceptions.reason: Helper package legitimately defines applyEvent types, validators, fixtures, and tests. Receiver-write detection does not apply.
Validation tooling exercises applyEvent envelopes against validators. Not a runtime consumer.
Helper package defines cacheMetadata constants, types, and fixtures. Source of truth.
Validation tooling references cacheMetadata in fixtures and scans.
